dv.edish 2.0.2
  • Reference
  • Changelog
  • Quality Control

Plain mock app without specific layout

mock_edish_app.Rd

mock_edish_app() launches a mock app containing the dv.edish shiny module.

Usage

mock_edish_app()

Developed by Boehringer-Ingelheim Pharma GmbH & Co.KG, Isabel Glauss, Mark Luff.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
